signals.raw: On April 14, 2026, Solana hit an all-time high of **167 million monthly token holders** and 148 million daily non-vote transactions, driving a **10% price surge** amid heightened network activity.[1]

signals.headline: The **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** was highlighted as highly anticipated, promising to reduce transaction finality from
signals.raw: The **Alpenglow consensus upgrade** was highlighted as highly anticipated, promising to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to **150 milliseconds**, alongside Firedancer validator progress boosting performance expectations.[1]

signals.headline: Institutional holdings in SOL ETFs by BlackRock and Fidelity reached records, supporting bullish momentum despite recent
signals.raw: Institutional holdings in SOL ETFs by BlackRock and Fidelity reached records, supporting bullish momentum despite recent market consolidation.[1]
